data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of machine credentials scoped to one installation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for machine credentials scoped to one installation. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of such scoped credentials. The linked use case mentions the need for installation-scoped API credentials but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is being fulfilled, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of machine credentials scoped to one installation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of machine credentials scoped to one installation.
